titleStmt.title: SII 38.198: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 198. (A.R. No. 198 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription contains an order of (the chief) Madhurāntakap Pottappichōḷan to the officials of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. It reveals that the land at Sembiyan Karuppūr, in Kōṭṭur-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam, has been ceded as dēvadāna in full to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr after cancelling the tax free status of dēvadānam, bhaṭṭavritti and other tax free lands of that village and the taxes collected from these lands were ordered to be utilized for conducting offerings and worship to the god of the above village. It is also recorded, however that as per the old agreement (oṭṭu) the land tax (kaḍamai) had been fixed at fifty kalam per vēli. This arrangement was also ordered to be engraved on the walls of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ciirācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu maturāntakap
pottappiccoḻaṉ Olai . Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉārkoyiṟ tāna
ttār kaṇṭu . karuppuḻār perumāṇaṭināyakkar kāṇiyāka koṇṭuṭaiya puliyūrk
koṭṭattuk koṭṭurnāṭṭu Ū(ṟu)rāṉa cempiyaṉkaruppūr Iru(p)pattoṉṟāva
tu varai nilaniṅkalāṉa yiṟaiyilitevatāṉam paṭṭavirutti Uḷpa(ṭ)ṭa niṅkal ni
kki Uḷḷaṭaṅkalum Irupattiraṇṭāvatu 100 4 10 mutal Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭai
ya nāyaṉārkkup pūcaikkun tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭat
tevatāṉamāka Iṭṭom Iṉṉāḷ mutal kaṭamai koḷḷum Iṭattu Irupattoṉṟāva
tu varai namakkut tiṟappil Iṟuttu vanta Oṭṭup paṭiye velaRead velikkup pācaṉam Aimpatiṉ kala
mum vaikāci viracal kuḷappāṉai Uḷḷiṭṭa naṉcai puṉcaikkum muṉpu Iṟuttu vantapaṭiye
koḷvatākavum Ippaṭikku tirumalaiyile caRead cilālekailālekai paṇṇik koḷvatākac coṉ
ṉom Ippaṭi ceyvate Itu paṉmāhecurar Iraṭkṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
